definitions: 乘船前往；起航去往（某地）

examples.text: With a group of heavily armed accomplices, he set sail for Honduras in hopes of reclaiming power by whatever means necessary.
examples.explanation: 这里的 set sail for 表示“起航前往”，强调乘船出发去洪都拉斯。整句意思是：他带着一群全副武装的同伙，乘船前往洪都拉斯，希望不择手段重新夺回权力。

source.text: The dark history of bananas - John Soluri
